description_long: This object is a pair of thick, partially melted candles mounted on a wide, faceted base that appears to be made of metal. The candles are irregularly shaped, with uneven tops and visible wax drips running down their sides, suggesting they have been used for some time. Each candle features a prominent, slightly bent wick at the top, and the base includes two angular, protruding handles, giving it a somewhat antique or utilitarian appearance. The base is octagonal and sturdy, designed to catch dripping wax and provide stability. The overall silhouette is bold and functional, with the handles likely intended for easy carrying or hanging. The object is primarily monochromatic, with the candles and base sharing a similar dark tone.
description: A pair of thick, partially melted candles with visible wax drips, mounted on a wide, faceted metal base with two angular handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing both candles side by side on the wide base, with the wicks and uneven tops clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular handles protruding from the base and the irregular candle shapes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the candles and the base, with the wicks less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing both handles and the full profile of the candles and base.
